wiki.summary: “ST. CHROMA” marks a new era of Tyler, The Creator music, acting as CHROMAKOPIA’s introduction. It was teased on October 16, 2024 with the reveal of the album, featuring additional vocals from Daniel Caesar. Following the brief teaser’s release, Caesar wrote to his Instagram Story: Did some vocals on this, very proud. Can’t wait for you all to hear the whole record. In context of CHROMAKOPIA, the YouTube bio of “ST CHROMA” is simply the number eight, referring to Tyler reaching his eighth studio album. Read more on Last.fm.
wiki.content: “ST. CHROMA” marks a new era of Tyler, The Creator music, acting as CHROMAKOPIA’s introduction. It was teased on October 16, 2024 with the reveal of the album, featuring additional vocals from Daniel Caesar. Following the brief teaser’s release, Caesar wrote to his Instagram Story: Did some vocals on this, very proud. Can’t wait for you all to hear the whole record. In context of CHROMAKOPIA, the YouTube bio of “ST CHROMA” is simply the number eight, referring to Tyler reaching his eighth studio album. Meanwhile, on Instagram, Tyler noted “1. st chroma” with the teaser, setting it as an introduction. Read more on Last.fm.
